kpis.conversionNote: CO2e = CH4 mass × 27.0, using IPCC AR6 100-year GWP for non-fossil methane. Units follow the CH4 CSV unit.

fields.sourceIntervalNote: CH4 values are loaded from uploaded CSV and interpolated to a 5-day display grid. Add more CSV rows and rerun scripts/build_data.py to extend the graph.
fields.waterIndexNote: Demo S1 water index proxy. Replace with real Sentinel-1 output by running scripts/fetch_sentinel1_water_proxy.py with Earth Engine credentials and a real field polygon.
